title: National recommendations for the transition to quantum-safe cryptography
summary: Sweden's National Cyber Security Centre sets out national recommendations for how organisations should carry out the transition to quantum-safe (post-quantum) cryptography. It frames the migration in relation to NIS2 and the Swedish cybersecurity act.

title: This is how the transition to quantum-safe cryptography should be done
summary: News article in which the National Cyber Security Centre announces and explains its recommendations for how Sweden should carry out the transition to quantum-safe cryptography.

title: Cybersecurity Conference 2025 - Together we strengthen our digital society
summary: NCSC conference report in which Alexander Engstrom of FRA presented on the transition to quantum-safe cryptography during the in-depth session.

title: Together we strengthen our digital society
summary: News page from the Swedish National Defence Radio Establishment (FRA), which hosts NCSC, referencing the national recommendations for the transition to quantum-safe cryptography.

title: Notice on the EU quantum strategy (fact memo on EU proposal)
summary: Swedish Parliament fact memo on the EU quantum strategy in which the government welcomes the Commission's approach to promoting the transition to quantum-safe cryptography to strengthen information and cyber security.

title: White paper and recommendation on the EU's digital infrastructure (fact memo)
summary: Swedish Parliament fact memo on the EU digital infrastructure white paper which defines post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as quantum-computer-secure public-key cryptography usable on classical computers.

title: Activities in the European Union during 2025 (Government Communication 2025/26:115)
summary: Annual government written communication to Parliament on EU activities, identifying the transition to quantum-safe cryptography as an important part of strengthening Europe's cybersecurity.

title: Towards a Swedish quantum ecosystem
summary: Report by the Swedish Agency for Economic and Regional Growth on building a Swedish quantum ecosystem. Flagged for review: candidate text describes quantum technologies broadly and does not show an explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography reference.

title: Rekommendationer för övergången till kvantsäker kryptografi (Tidpunkter)
summary: NCSC Sweden publication setting out the recommended timepoints (Tidpunkter) for the transition to quantum-safe cryptography, with end-2035 as the general deadline and end-2030 for information needing protection for ten years or more, and naming NIST FIPS 203/204/205 as the standardised algorithms. Distinct file from the main national recommendations PDF already in the corpus.

title: Kvantsäkra krypton – ett begrepp att lära sig
summary: FRA news article (29 April 2026) in which mathematician Alexander Engström explains why organisations must move to quantum-safe (post-quantum) cryptography, highlighting the harvest-now-decrypt-later threat and stating that Swedish authorities will lead the transition over the next five years.

title: Policy för utveckling och integrering av ny cybersäkerhetsteknologi
summary: MSB (from 1 Jan 2026 the Agency for Civil Defence, MCF) policy on developing and integrating new cybersecurity technology, naming quantum cryptography among a new generation of risk-management tools and referencing the transition to post-quantum cryptography. Flagged for review: the explicit PQC framing appears alongside broader emerging-technology and EU-call language, so QSC-specificity is borderline.
